name: Blue Corn Tortilla Stack
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the Salsa de Chile Colorado: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a medium skillet, fry each tortilla in a little oil over medium heat until just cooked but not crisp. Quickly dip each tortilla into the salsa as you build the stacks.
3. In an ovenproof baking dish large enough to hold four blue corn tortillas side by side without touching, place the first four tortillas.
4. Top each tortilla with 1/4 cup of the cooked chicken.
5. Top the chicken with 1/4 cup of the grated cheese. Sprinkle the cheese with 1 teaspoon of pine nuts and 1 teaspoon of cilantro.
6. Repeat layering four tortillas, 1/4 cup chicken, 1/4 cup cheese, 1 teaspoon pine nuts, and 1 teaspoon cilantro, and finally top with the last four tortillas.
7. Pour the remaining salsa over all the stacks.
8. Bake for about 15 to 20 minutes. Transfer each stack to a plate, garnish with red onion and lime wedges, and serve immediately.
